arts.ttl: Leipzig updates: Baku deal finalized for €4.5 million, Okafor also secured on loan
arts.sum: Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that - after completing a Friday medical in the Saxon capital - Ridle Baku's transfer to RB Leipzig will be officially confirmed. Transfer gurus Fabrizio Romano, Gianluca di Marzio, and Philipp Hinze, meanwhile, also report that the German Red Bulls have secured the services of another player.

arts.ttl: AC Milan Finalise Transfer Agreement with RB Leipzig for Noah Okafor
arts.sum: AC Milan have reached a preliminary agreement with RB Leipzig for the transfer of Noah Okafor. The post AC Milan Finalise Transfer Agreement with RB Leipzig for Noah Okafor appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Done Deal: Milan send Okafor to RB Leipzig, now for Rashford
arts.sum: Noah Okafor is expected to fly out to Germany tomorrow for a loan with option...

arts.ttl: Milan and Okafor edge closer to RB Leipzig agreement
arts.sum: Milan talks are progressing to send Noah Okafor to RB Leipzig on loan with option...
